# Share Business Concepts

> Professional financial education platform offering structured online training in stock market fundamentals, technical analysis, options trading, and NISM exam preparation.

## About
Share Business Concepts is an online stock market training platform founded by Lavanya Hariharasubramanian. We offer structured trading education programs for beginners to advanced traders across India. Our motto: "Make Charts Your Mother Tongue."

## Programs Offered

- **Type 1: Pure Fundamentals (Rs. 10,000)** — 1-day program covering financial statement analysis, balance sheets, key metrics, qualitative and quantitative factors.
- **Type 2: Structured Trading (Rs. 20,000)** — Beginner program covering stock market basics, fundamental analysis, technical analysis, derivative concepts, risk management, and mind management. 2 days theory + 2 days practical.
- **Type 3: Structured Trading - Fast Track (Rs. 25,000)** — Intensive fast track version covering stock market fundamentals, technical analysis, and options trading in 2 days.
- **Type 4: Options Strategies (Rs. 15,000)** — Advanced 2-day program covering options strategies, risk management, and advanced trading setups. Prerequisite: Type 2 or Type 3.
- **Type 5: NISM Exam Training (Rs. 10,000)** — 3-day certification preparation program for NISM exams with complete study materials.

## Details
- All programs are conducted online
- Languages: English, Tamil
- Contact: WhatsApp +91 7904472956
- Website: https://sharebusinessconcepts.com
- View Batches (English): https://sharebusinessconcepts.com/schedule/?type=1 (replace type number 1-5 for each program)
- View Batches (Tamil): https://sharebusinessconcepts.com/ta/schedule/?type=1 (replace type number 1-5 for each program)
- Tamil page: https://sharebusinessconcepts.com/ta/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sharebusinessconcepts
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@sharebusinessconcepts
